prospect.name: Rosano Ferretti NYC
prospect.notes: Upscale Midtown townhouse; site feels dated.

evidence.claim: Strong physical interior — marble, brass, curated art. But website design is visibly dated (Flash-era layout).
Instagram grid is mixed — some editorial shots, some smartphone snaps with inconsistent lighting.

categories.missing_data_note: Dated web presence undersells what appears to be a genuinely premium physical salon.

evidence.claim: Menu includes signature 'Metodo Rosano' treatments — a named proprietary ritual.
evidence.excerpt: Metodo Rosano — a natural, curl-by-curl dry cut developed over 25 years.

evidence.claim: Retail mentioned briefly; no dedicated product page.

categories.missing_data_note: Retail footprint unclear from public materials.

evidence.claim: Brand philosophy emphasizes 'natural methodology' and respect for the hair — wellness-adjacent but not explicitly scalp-led.
Reviews from editors, stylists, and named public figures.
Townhouse format with multiple floors — private-room potential likely exists but must be confirmed.

categories.missing_data_note: Floor plan and plumbing configuration unknown without site visit.

evidence.claim: International footprint — sibling locations in Rome and Madrid. NYC location team size appears moderate (~8 stylists).
High AOV plus named-talent demand suggests revenue likely above $1M at this location.
Brand is premium and selective, though the web presence currently undersells the in-person experience.

evidence_payload.summary_note: Physically a strong fit; digital presence creates analysis uncertainty. Warrant a human review + site visit.
